# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest stable version of Filterable receives security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest  | ✅        |
| Older   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it by emailing:

📧 **kettasoft@gmail.com**

Include as much detail as possible:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fix (optional)

## What to Expect

- **Acknowledgement** within 48 hours
- **Status update** within 7 days
- **Fix & disclosure** as soon as a patch is ready

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will credit you in the release notes if you wish.
